title: Designing a Social Media Persona
scenario: Create a persona description for a 25-year-old social media manager named Alex. Alex is responsible for managing the online presence of a small business and is tasked with increasing engagement on the company's Instagram page. Describe Alex's personality, interests, values, and online behavior in a concise and engaging way. Use a conversational tone and keep the description under 150 words.

evaluationCriteria.description: Is the tone of the persona description conversational and engaging?
Does the persona description adhere to the word limit and tone requirements?
Is the persona description clear and easy to understand?
